word: G23 - ἀγανακτέω - aganaktéō - ag-an-ak-teh'-o - Be much displeased

sections.paragraph:
ἀγανακτέω - aganakteō - ag-an-ak-teh'-o

From ἄγαν agan (much) and ἄχθος achhos̄ (grief; akin to the base of G43); to be greatly afflicted, that is, (figuratively) indignant: - be much (sore) displeased, have (be moved with, with) indignation.
